programme.title: Kings Of Pain
programme.desc: In Mexico, Adam and Caveman Rob tango with two torturous animals. The guys up the stakes by covering their hands with hundreds of Harvester ants, as the pain index records are shattered.

programme.title: Mark Berg's Fishing Addiction
programme.desc: Fishing expert Mark Berg visits some of the best fishing destinations around. Chasing a wide variety of fish, Mark is always hoping to capture a new species or develop a new technique.

programme.title: Al McGlashan's Fish'n With Mates
programme.desc: Al McGlashan's ticking off items from his personal fishing bucket list, including the chance to swim with a swirling vortex of spawning snapper despite the danger of lurking sharks.

programme.title: Creek to Coast
programme.desc: Ben hits the Glass House tracks. It is prawns galore this Easter. Gary has basic tips for watercraft and Scott is talking species, this week it is bream.

programme.title: Night Thunder
programme.desc: It's been a big season to celebrate at Perth Motorplex and it all goes on the line in the big final show for the Maddington Toyota Sprintcar Series.

programme.title: Supercars Highlights
programme.desc: Catch all the highlights as the Supercars returned to Taupo International Motorsport Park for the first round of The NZ Double Header.

programme.title: Blokesworld
programme.desc: Ado and Camera 3 travel the world to prove that blokes are the same all over, and they all share the same passions.

programme.title: American Restoration
programme.desc: Rick roasts up a piping hot coffee grinder overhaul, after a client spies a recently picked 1800s coffee grinder sitting in the shop's boneyard.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.sub-title: Goat Tell it on the Mountain
programme.desc: The buyers head out to Lake Arrowhead, California, where Ivy puts economies of scale to the test. Justin almost hits the bullseye on his locker, and Darrell and Chad find fortunes on the farm.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The guys hit the alleys of small-town Illinois where Mike bids on the rusty frame of the most famous hot rod of all-time. The guys get unprecedented access to a family's dusty collection. Mike and Frank agree to invest some serious coin in a legendary restoration project.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The Old Man is off to the races, when he gets his hands on an electronic horse race analyser.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Corey and Chumlee check out a Terminator skill stop slot machine. Will the guys save the future by defeating this Terminator, or is this killer robot more than they can handle?

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: A traffic cop is used to abuse but when a senior constable pulls over a driver, he gets a reaction like never before. An officer stops a car with two extremely stoned occupants - and a baby on board.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: Sr Constable Dean Pickering has seen a lot of young men die on the roads, so he's enraged when he spots three car loads of teenagers racing each other and, even worse, half-climbing out of their vehicles at speed.

programme.title: The Force - Behind the Line
programme.desc: Specialist police deal with a potentially explosive situation in a family home. The party is definitely over for this drunk teenage driver. And an unusual call out for two officers on a cold winters night. Hosted by Simon Reeve.

programme.title: The Force - Behind the Line
programme.desc: A drug affected man holds up a petrol station. After months of investigations, police suspect two video shops are pirating DVDs. And emergency services respond fast when a car ploughs into the front of a house. Hosted by Simon Reeve.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: As the worst winter in decades rages across the nation, the Mountain Men must fight to stay on top of the food chain.

programme.title: American Restoration
programme.desc: The clock is running for Rick and his crew when they hail in a 1950s taximeter. Later, it is Brettly's big break when he oversees the restoration of an 1800s Zeno gum vending machine.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Dave brings his mentor with him to Rancho Cucamonga, California, but has little to show for it. Brandi and Jarrod go all in on a hunch. Ivy shows a sceptical Emily how he pulls a win out of a locker.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: With slim pickings in southern Florida, Mike and Frank finally stumble on a hurricane-ravaged barn. The guys scour a millionaire's awesome collection where they spring for a mysterious car part.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The team fasten their seat belts when a 2003 Lamborghini Murcielago speeds into the shop. Originally purchased for $400,000, will Corey keep the negotiation on track?

programme.title: AFL
programme.desc: The Blues go head-to-head with the Magpies, live and free from the MCG. Bounce time: 7:30 pm AEST.

programme.title: AFL Post Game
programme.desc: A look back at all the action from tonight's game.

programme.title: Kick Ons
programme.desc: Join the team as they debate the hottest AFL topics and preview the biggest games over the weekend. Sit back, relax and enjoy Kick Ons after the Footy!

programme.title: Happy Gilmore
programme.desc: After his grandmother's house is repossessed by the IRS, a bad-tempered hockey player takes his talents to golf to earn the big bucks and get his grandmother's house back.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: With slim pickings in southern Florida, Mike and Frank finally stumble on a hurricane-ravaged barn. The guys scour a millionaire's awesome collection where they spring for a mysterious car part.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: As the worst winter in decades rages across the nation, the Mountain Men must fight to stay on top of the food chain.

programme.title: The Front Bar
programme.desc: Join Sam Pang, Mick Molloy and Andy Maher as they share a laugh about the world of AFL and catch up with stars of yesteryear and today.

programme.title: LIV Golf League
programme.desc: The 2026 LIV Golf tour heads to Club de Golf Chapultepec in Mexico City, Mexico. Catch all the action right here, live and free on 7 & 7plus.

programme.title: Supercars Highlights
programme.desc: Catch all the highlights as the Supercars return to Taupo International Motorsport Park for the first round of The NZ Double Header.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: As the worst winter in decades rages across the nation, the Mountain Men must fight to stay on top of the food chain.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Dave brings his mentor with him to Rancho Cucamonga, California, but has little to show for it. Brandi and Jarrod go all in on a hunch. Ivy shows a sceptical Emily how he pulls a win out of a locker.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: With slim pickings in southern Florida, Mike and Frank finally stumble on a hurricane-ravaged barn. The guys scour a millionaire's awesome collection where they spring for a mysterious car part.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The team fasten their seat belts when a 2003 Lamborghini Murcielago speeds into the shop. Originally purchased for $400,000, will Corey keep the negotiation on track?

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: A guy comes in with a genuine Olympic torch, which was carried in the opening ceremonies of the 1984 summer games.

programme.title: Kick Ons
programme.desc: Join the team as they debate the hottest AFL topics and preview the biggest games over the weekend. Sit back, relax and enjoy Kick Ons after the Footy!

programme.title: STIHL Timbersports Series
programme.desc: Follow Australia's top lumberjack sports athletes as they compete with axes and saws.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Marty makes a new start in some of Alaska's most unforgiving terrain, but his first solo flight into the Revelation Mountains becomes a dangerous ordeal. Kyle helps his son Ben break his first colt.

programme.title: American Restoration
programme.desc: It's time for some soon-to-be stepbrothers' bonding when Tyler and Brettly volunteer to tow in a 1947 railroad speeder. Later, a client brings in a NYC police call box.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Nine stories of treasures in the Koreatown neighbourhood of Los Angeles. The Vegas Ladies discover that one of them has Texas flair. Mary gets the spring back in her step.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: In Florida, Mike and Frank get VIP access to an authentic retro sideshow where they meet the Wolf Boy and a world champion sword swallower. Later, the guys get junk drunk at a former pawnshop owner's jam-packed property. At a Tampa museum, the guys get some great news about a carnie artefact.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The end is near for the team when they check out an alleged original print by Renaissance artist Albrecht Durer, known for his depictions of the apocalypse.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Chumlee nearly loses his grip when a pair of Marty McFly high tops levitates into the shop. A limited edition Nike shoe, will Chumlee tie up the deal, or will he send these kicks back to the future?

programme.title: Surveillance Oz
programme.desc: In this week's episode, teenagers get stuck in a lift they're defacing with graffiti, a fiery crash makes heroes out of bystanders and a late-night robbery doesn't go to plan.

programme.title: Surveillance Oz
programme.desc: A car enters a tunnel on fire, someone threatens Sydney Trains with a bomb, a man tries to buy a drink after the bar has closed and a toddler stepping on to a train disappears onto the tracks.

programme.title: Ticket To Paradise
programme.desc: A divorced couple teams up and travels to Bali to stop their daughter from making the same mistake they think they made 25 years ago.

programme.title: Scent of a Woman
programme.desc: A blind ex-soldier pays a timid student to accompany him on a wild weekend trip, but the job is not at all what he anticipated.

programme.title: Surveillance Oz
programme.desc: In this week's episode, teenagers get stuck in a lift they're defacing with graffiti, a fiery crash makes heroes out of bystanders and a late-night robbery doesn't go to plan.

programme.title: Surveillance Oz
programme.desc: A car enters a tunnel on fire, someone threatens Sydney Trains with a bomb, a man tries to buy a drink after the bar has closed and a toddler stepping on to a train disappears onto the tracks.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The end is near for the team when they check out an alleged original print by Renaissance artist Albrecht Durer, known for his depictions of the apocalypse.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Chumlee nearly loses his grip when a pair of Marty McFly high tops levitates into the shop. A limited edition Nike shoe, will Chumlee tie up the deal, or will he send these kicks back to the future?

programme.title: LIV Golf League
programme.desc: The 2026 LIV Golf tour heads to Club de Golf Chapultepec in Mexico City, Mexico. Catch all the action right here, live and free on 7 & 7plus.
